headline: **MLB Daily Recap: May 6, 2026**
article:
The Tampa Bay Rays secured a shutout victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Shane McClanahan earning the win after 5.2 innings of scoreless baseball. Ian Seymour closed out the game with a save. The Milwaukee Brewers took down the St. Louis Cardinals 6-2, led by Andrew Vaughn's 2 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs. The Los Angeles Dodgers dominated the Houston Astros 12-2, with Andy Pages hitting three home runs and driving in six runs.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Luis Campusano (left toe fracture) and Joe Musgrove (undisclosed reason) for the San Diego Padres. Roman Anthony (right wrist sprain) has been placed on the injured list for the Boston Red Sox, while Chris Devenski (undisclosed illness) and Matthew Boyd (left meniscus injury) have been placed on the injured list for the Pittsburgh Pirates and Chicago Cubs, respectively.

The Chicago Cubs acquired RHP Tyler Ferguson from the Athletics, while the Tampa Bay Rays traded RHP Yoendrys Gómez to the Minnesota Twins for cash. The Philadelphia Phillies traded RHP Trevor Richards to the Chicago White Sox for cash, and the Atlanta Braves traded C Jonah Heim to the Athletics for cash. The Washington Nationals traded 3B Zack Short to the Detroit Tigers for cash.

top_news.title: **Rays Shut Out Blue Jays 3-0**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays secured a shutout victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Shane McClanahan earning the win after 5.2 innings of scoreless baseball. Ian Seymour closed out the game with a save.

top_news.title: **Brewers Take Down Cardinals 6-2**
top_news.summary: The Milwaukee Brewers secured a 6-2 victory over the St. Louis Cardinals, with Andrew Vaughn leading the offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs. Aaron Ashby earned the win for the Brewers.

top_news.title: **Dodgers Blast Astros 12-2 in Dominant Performance**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Dodgers cruised to a 12-2 victory over the Houston Astros, behind a historic night from Andy Pages. Pages hit three home runs and drove in six runs, including a key eighth homer on a fly ball to left field.

top_news.title: **Padres Take Down Giants 5-1**
top_news.summary: The San Diego Padres secured a 5-1 victory over the San Francisco Giants, with Matt Waldron earning the win after 5.0 IP, 7 K, 1 ER, 0 BB, 2 H. Xander Bogaerts led the Padres' offense with a 1 H, 1 HR, 2 RBI performance.

top_news.title: **Yankees Rout Rangers 9-2**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees dominated the Texas Rangers in a lopsided 9-2 victory, handing the Rangers their loss. Brandon Nimmo and Cody Bellinger led the Yankees' offense, while Ezequiel Duran was one of the few bright spots for the Rangers.

top_news.title: **Nationals Take Down Twins 7-5**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals secured a 7-5 win over the Minnesota Twins, snapping their opponent's momentum. Impact hitters for both teams included Ryan Jeffers and Brooks Lee for the Twins, and Keibert Ruiz for the Nationals.

top_news.title: **Padres Place Campusano on 10-Day IL**
top_news.summary: San Diego Padres catcher Luis Campusano has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a left toe fracture.

top_news.title: **Ferguson Joins Cubs Roster**
top_news.summary: The Chicago Cubs have acquired right-handed pitcher Tyler Ferguson in a trade. The Athletics traded Ferguson to the Cubs.
